title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Sasken Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
